reviews.review_title: I spawn out side the car ???
reviews.review_description: I load in out side the car

reviews.review_title: Racer left in the Stone Age
reviews.review_description:
An interesting title that has a neat art style but fails to impress anywhere else. Unfortunately the driving feels totally off which combined with the basic looking game makes this basically an early racing game test. While I love seeing free games on app lab especially racing ones I think this game is far too lacking to be worth your time unless you just enjoy testing this stuff out for a laugh.

Video - https://youtu.be/b98dVZ82IKs
